ORDER GRANTING ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

COURT TRIAL HELD. SETTLEMENT REACHED. JUDGMENT ENTERED FOR PLTF FOR THE PREMISES AT 305 HYDE ST. #305 SF., CA. JUDGMENT IS NOT ENTERED IF DEFT COMPLIES WITH THE TERMS. DEFT TO PAY BACK RENT OF $532 FOR NOV. ON 12-20-04 AND THEN DECEMBER 2004 RENT WITHIN 48 HOURS. DEFT HAS A ROOMMATE: ABDEL RAHMAN. NO MORE THAN TWO ROOMMATES ALLOWED INCLUDING DEFT. DEFT TO REQUEST IN WRITING PERMISSION FOR NEW ROOMMATE. PLTF THEN HAS 10 DAYS TO RESPOND. IF THE TERMS VIOLATED, THIS COURT (OR PRESIDING JUDGE) ENTERS JUDGMENT WITH 72 HOUR NOTICE TO DEFT. WRITS MAY BE ISSUED TO START EVICTION PROCESS. THIS COURT WILL RETAIN JURISDICTION DURING DEFT'S TENANCY. JUDGE JOHN E. MUNTER;REPORTER SARA LERSCHEN;CLERK T.MARUYAMA (505)
